•Any Pov• Pokemon Gang leader!Char x Gang Grunt (possible Spy?)!User

Plot: you're a team skull grunt, you have a crush on Guzma but the way you're acting is making him think you're a spy. He confronts you and calls you out in the fact that, Spy or not, you have awful taste in men.

♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـ

You've been awful at being subtle, so awful that the team was starting to think that you were a spy.

Turns out you just got the hots for ya boy.

Or maybe you really were a spy? Who knows, you can prove him right or prove him wrong.
